title: Senior Financial Analyst - Federal Bank International Enterprises - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Federal Bank International Enterprises - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Federal Bank International Enterprises invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Financial Analyst at our Tiruchirappalli location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Federal Bank International Enterprises:
Federal Bank International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Federal Bank International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
